zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph De Peverel於大約1020年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc18歲，母親Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy18歲。他和Maud de Ingelrica至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1100年在英國賀特福爾哈特菲爾德享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph De Peverel于大约1020年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc18岁，母亲Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy18岁。他和Maud de Ingelrica至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1100年在英国賀特福爾哈特菲爾德享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph De Peverel was born about 1020, in Normandy, France, his father, Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc, was 18 and his mother, Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Maud de Ingelrica. He died about 1100, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph De Peverel est né environ 1020, à Normandie, France, son père, Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Maud de Ingelrica. Il est décédé environ 1100, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph De Peverel um 1020 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc 18 und seine Mutter Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy 18. Er hatte mit Maud de Ingelrica mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1100 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph De Peverel è nato il circa 1020 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Maud de Ingelrica. Morì circa 1100, nel Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Peverelが約1020年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Ranulph Peverel De Wrenocは18歳，母Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandyは18歳であった。彼はMaud de Ingelricaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1100年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Peverel(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Maud de Ingelrica(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1100년 영국 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1020–about 1100: tany ho any amin'ny 1020–tany ho any amin'ny 1100

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph De Peverel nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Maud de Ingelrica. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph De Peverel родился около 1020 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Maud de Ingelrica. Он умер около 1100 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

sm.about 1020–about 1100: e tusa o le 1020–e tusa o le 1100

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulph De Peverel nació aproximadamente 1020, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ranulph Peverel De Wrenoc, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mortaigne Herleve Arlette Fitzcourtanneur Fitzrichard Duchess of Normandy, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Maud de Ingelrica. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
